steps.title: Relate the y-intercept to the initial deposit
steps.content: The function $f(x)$ gives the balance $x$ months after the initial deposit, so $f(0)$ is the balance at month $0$ — the initial deposit itself.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept from the graph
steps.content:
The graph crosses the y-axis at about $35$, so the initial deposit is approximately \$35.

The answer is 35.
